next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) level and serum/urine calcium
18F-FDG PET/CT to identify sites for biopsy and assess cardiac involvement
